reference: I have had pain in my right mid to lower back for a few weeks. Sometimes it's a sharp pain, but other times it's dull. It seems to be coming more frequently and lasting longer, sometimes for hours. Could this be a kidney problem? I am a thirty-nine-year-old female.
text: I have had pain in my right mid to lower back for a few weeks. Sometimes it's a sharp pain, but other times it's dull. It seems to be coming more frequently and lasting longer, sometimes for hours. Could this be a kidney problem? I am a 39-year-old female.
